name: Fuzhou Rockchip Electronics Co.,Ltd.
summary: Fuzhou Rockchip Electronics Co.,Ltd operates as a fabless semiconductor company in China. It offers professional end-to-end system-on-chip solutions for use in tablets, notebooks, Chromebooks, IPTV/OTT-boxes, Internet of things, smart audio products, intelligent video application in smartphone, robotics, and other smart devices, as well as drone, IPC, and CVR applications. The company was founded in 2001 and is headquartered in Fuzhou, China.
